overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from a fantasy wizarding school, showing a grassy castle courtyard with students and faculty in robes. The camera remains stationary behind a character holding a broom, facing ornate stone towers and castle spires under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard lawn with stone towers

agents.ego_description: player character holding a broom, standing still on the grass facing a group of robed figures

notable_agents.action: robed professor gesturing with hands while conversing with the player
group of three students in dark robes standing together and talking

entered.detail: tall golden-yellow stone tower with pointed roof and crenellations
tall red-brick tower with arched windows and decorative stonework
gothic stone spires visible behind the main towers
ancient stone wall covered in green moss and ivy
string of colorful triangular flags suspended between towers
well-maintained green grass covering the courtyard ground

segments.scene_description: A static third-person view of a wizarding school courtyard with the player character holding a broom standing on a grassy lawn. Historic stone towers rise in the background connected by festive bunting, while NPC students and professors stand in small groups conversing under bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady third-person perspective of a vibrant wizarding school courtyard bathed in bright midday sun. It begins with a focused view of a player character standing on a lush grassy lawn while holding a broom. As the camera lingers, the scene reveals historic stone towers rising in the background, linked by festive bunting that flutters in the air. The view then expands to encompass the wider grounds, where groups of NPC students and professors in robes stand conversing across the courtyard.
